tasks.label: Create virtual environment and install Python packages
tasks.command: python -m venv project/.venv && project/.venv/Scripts/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && project/.venv/Scripts/python -m pip install -r project/requirements.txt

windows.command: python -m venv project/.venv; project/.venv/Scripts/python -m pip install --upgrade pip; project/.venv/Scripts/python -m pip install -r project/requirements.txt

linux.command: python3 -m venv project/.venv && project/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && project/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r project/requirements.txt
